mapper.insert: insert into dms_medicine_prescription_record (status, create_time, amount, name, registration_id, refund_status, type, create_staff_id) values (#{status}, #{createTime}, #{amount}, #{name}, #{registrationId}, #{refundStatus}, #{type}, #{createStaffId})
mapper.select: select * from dms_medicine_prescription_record where registration_id = #{registrationId} and (status is null or status <> 2) and (refund_status is null or refund_status = 0) order by id desc
select COALESCE(sum(amount), 0) from dms_medicine_prescription_record where registration_id = #{registrationId} and (status is null or status <> 2) and (refund_status is null or refund_status = 0)
